hypothesis: If the Bayesian optimization workflow, employing the five pretrained representations and GP/deep kernel/Laplace surrogates with Thompson sampling, is used to search the 1,000 fragment-generated polyamines, then the top predicted polymers will exhibit higher CO2 adsorption capacity at 298 K and 0.4 mbar than those selected by unguided search, because Bayesian optimization efficiently balances exploration and exploitation and exploits informative molecular representations.
